articles.title: Quote of the day by The Bell Jar writer Sylvia Plath: 'The hardest thing, I think, is to live richly in the present, without letting it be tainted...' ; life lessons on staying rooted in our present from American poet
articles.description: Poet Sylvia Plath's timeless wisdom highlights the struggle to live fully in the present, unburdened by past regrets or future anxieties. Her words, penned decades ago, resonate today, reminding us that true fulfillment lies in appreciating the now. This enduring message encourages focusing on the present, the only moment we truly control, while learning from yesterday and preparing for tomorrow without letting them overshadow today's joys.

articles.title: Who is BabyJayne? Here's what to know about the YouTuber making claims against ChudTheBuilder
articles.description: Trans YouTuber BabyJayne has ignited online debate with a video detailing a past personal relationship with internet personality ChudTheBuilder. She presented alleged photos and private messages, claiming an intimate connection in 2025 and alleging misogynistic comments. These unverified claims surface as ChudTheBuilder, real name Dalton Eatherly, faces serious legal charges including attempted murder. He has not yet responded to BabyJayne's allegations.

articles.title: Hyderabad techie, earning Rs 23,000 per month, is desperate for a job with lesser pay: 'By the time I get home...'
articles.description: A young Hyderabad engineer, earning ₹23,000 monthly, revealed on Reddit her desperate wish for a pay cut to escape a grueling six-day work week. The demanding schedule leaves her exhausted, impacting her health and personal life. With ₹8,000 for rent, ₹10,000 sent home, and ₹5,000 for expenses, savings are impossible. Online users offered support and encouraged her to seek better opportunities.

articles.title: Bollywood stars who follow the early dinner rule for fitness
articles.description: Health often becomes a crucial subject when one is affected by sickness. However, many celebrities who work continuously for hours on film sets have advocated for fitness and improved mobility over many years. One of the most important rituals Bollywood stars follow religiously is eating before 7 pm. Prioritising a stable lifestyle, the actors consume their last meal by the evening and close kitchen chores before night. From Anushka Sharma to Malaika Arora, let’s take a look at the Bollywood celebrities who advocate for having dinner as a fitness practice.

articles.title: Maurya Siddavaram and Tanvi Aakanksha's film JOKER under Meera Productions officially launched
articles.description: Meera Productions' maiden venture, JOKER starring Maurya Siddavaram and Tanvi Aakanksha in the lead roles, was formally launched on Saturday with traditional pooja ceremonies. The event took place at Ramanaidu Studios in Hyderabad and was attended by several prominent personalities from the Telugu film industry. The event was graced by big celebrities. Ace producer Allu Aravind sounded the clap for the inaugural shot, while Allu Sneha switched on the camera. Young producer Bunny Vas handed over the script, marking the official launch of the project. Speaking on the occasion, producer Sandeep Ramineni (Sandy) said , "This is the first production from our banner and it is being made as a complete entertainer. Director Geetha C. Shekhar has crafted a script that blends fun-filled entertainment with an emotional touch. Maurya and Tanvi make a charming on-screen pair, and we are confident they will impress audiences. We plan to begin the regular shoot in August, and details about the remaining cast and technical crew will be announced soon." Cast : Maurya Siddavaram, Tanvi Aakanksha & Others Technical Crew: Banner: Meera Productions Producer: Sandeep Ramineni (Sandy) Director: Geetha C. Shekhar Cinematography: Suresh Raguthu

articles.title: Quote of the day by Meg Cabot: 'As you age, you lose friends. With luck, you'll be able to hang on to your true friends. Because friends like that are more precious than all the tiaras in the world' - A timeless lesson on friendship by The Princess Diaries author
articles.description: Author Meg Cabot's memorable quote from The Princess Diaries reminds us that as we grow older, some friendships naturally fade. But the true friends who stay through every phase of life are priceless. Their love, loyalty and support are worth far more than money, fame or any material possession. Read on to know why it still feels relatable.

articles.title: K. Bhagyaraj: Tamil cinema’s master of screenplay and storytelling
articles.description: Explore K. Bhagyaraj's impact on Tamil cinema through his masterful screenwriting, storytelling, and signature blend of comedy and music.

articles.title: Remembering K Bhagyaraj through five classic films
articles.description: Renowned Tamil filmmaker K. Bhagyaraj has passed away, leaving behind a rich cinematic legacy. His directorial prowess gifted audiences with numerous hits, including the romantic family drama 'Thooral Ninnu Pochu' and the sensitive exploration of marriage in 'Mouna Geethangal'. He also helmed the gripping crime thriller 'Oru Kaidhiyin Diary' and the successful Bollywood venture 'Aakhree Raasta', showcasing his versatility and impact on Indian cinema.

articles.title: Veteran Tamil filmmaker and actor K Bhagyaraj dies of heart attack at 73
articles.description: Veteran Tamil filmmaker, actor and screenwriter K Bhagyaraj has died of a heart attack in Chennai at the age of 73, leaving behind a lasting cinematic legacy

articles.title: Angelina Jolie vows to 'defeat the case at trial' after Brad Pitt's court win in winery battle
articles.description: The legal showdown between Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt over Château Miraval escalates as a judge permits Pitt to question executives from the purchasing company. Pitt claims the buyer is tied to a 'Russia-affiliated spirits conglomerate,' which could jeopardize his reputation. In contrast, Jolie's legal team argues the sale was purely business-oriented and eagerly anticipates the trial, downplaying the court's recent decisions.

articles.title: Amid Brad Pitt legal drama, Angelina Jolie gushes about ex-husband Jonny Lee Miller; says they 'remain wonderful friends'
articles.description: Angelina Jolie, amidst her ongoing legal tussle with ex-husband Brad Pitt, has revealed a surprisingly warm friendship with her first husband, actor Jonny Lee Miller. The pair, who married thirty years ago after meeting on the set of 'Hackers', have remained close friends, even recently reuniting professionally after three decades. Jolie expressed happiness over their enduring bond, highlighting their shared connection as parents.

articles.title: 'Ghar ki murgi le aao': Arshad Warsi recalls wife Maria Goretti being considered for 'Munna Bhai MBBS'
articles.description: In an intriguing revelation, Arshad Warsi shared that his wife, Maria Goretti, was once considered for the role of Circuit's wife in 'Munna Bhai MBBS.' Director Rajkumar Hirani mentioned that a nurse from the film was ultimately selected for the character due to budget limitations. This tidbit coincides with Warsi's exciting lead-up to his new show, 'Pritam and Pedro.'

articles.title: 'Princess Diaries 3': Author Meg Cabot calls the new script ‘amazing’; says it has ‘a really fun idea’
articles.description: Great news for 'Princess Diaries' enthusiasts! The eagerly awaited screenplay for the third installment is finished and has received enthusiastic acclaim from the original author, Meg Cabot. Despite earlier hiccups in development, the project is back on track, with Anne Hathaway ready to don her tiara as Princess Mia once more. Fans can look forward to a sequel that promises to satisfy.

Viewers can expect shocking revelations about the nightmarish town's darkest secrets. Following last week's dramatic moment where the Man in Yellow's motives were unveiled, and Clara's shocking betrayal surfaced, Tabitha and Jade delve into the grim fate of the captured children.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Pablo Picasso: “I don’t say everything, but I paint everything”
articles.description: Pablo Picasso's famous quote, 'I don’t say everything, but I paint everything,' highlights art's power to convey unspoken emotions and complex perspectives. His revolutionary Cubist style, showcasing multiple viewpoints simultaneously, exemplifies this. The article suggests that for many, creative expression offers a vital outlet for feelings and identities that words alone cannot capture, revealing a profound inner life through visual form.

articles.title: Just when you thought Maggi couldn't get any wilder, Pulse Candy entered the pan; internet says, ‘Maggi ke saath atyachar ho raha hai’
articles.description: A bizarre Maggi recipe featuring Pulse candies has taken the internet by storm, sparking widespread disbelief and amusement. The viral video shows the candies being melted with milk, then combined with Maggi noodles and masala. Online reactions range from humorous comparisons to strong disapproval, with many questioning the culinary logic behind this unusual creation. The dish has certainly ignited a fresh debate about food experimentation.
